title: Footer Update with Copyright and Navigation Links
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the app footer to display copyright information and links to Privacy Policy and Contact Us, so that I have easy access to support resources and the branding matches datatoolspro.com.
description:
Update the application footer to match the datatoolspro.com website branding.

## Footer Layout
- Left side: `© 2023 Data Tools Pro. All rights reserved.`
- Right side: Privacy Policy link → datatoolspro.com/support, Contact Us link → datatoolspro.com/contact/
acceptance_criteria: Footer displays '© 2023 Data Tools Pro. All rights reserved.' on the left
Privacy Policy link points to datatoolspro.com/support
Contact Us link points to datatoolspro.com/contact/
ux_changes: App footer updated with copyright text on the left and Privacy Policy / Contact Us links on the right, matching datatoolspro.com branding.
comment_summary: Developer implemented and submitted for review.
